hero.headline:
Your apartment,
engineered to perfection.
hero.subheadline: From bare walls to a finished home — guided by AI, backed by trusted local traders across Egypt.

numbers.title: The Market in Numbers
numbers.stat4Label: of materials wasted due to wrong purchases

problem.title: Egypt's finishing market is broken
problem.subtitle: Homeowners lose time and money every day because of four real problems.
problem.card1Desc: Counterfeit cables and substandard wiring cause fires and failures years later.
problem.card1Solution: Every product on Malaaz passes certified quality tests before it is listed.
problem.card2Desc: Customers can't tell 2.5mm from 4mm wire and rely entirely on the contractor's word.
problem.card2Solution: The AI Engineer calculates exact specs and prevents manipulation.
problem.card3Desc: The same product sells at one price in Ataba and a much higher price in Nasr City.
problem.card3Solution: Transparent pricing from the closest verified trader in your area.
problem.card4Desc: The fear that costs spiral out of control and savings disappear.
problem.card4Solution: The Cost Simulator shows your total finishing cost before you buy a single item.

howItWorks.title: Three steps from bare walls to a finished home
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share a photo of your room or floor plan. The AI analyzes the space and layout.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Calculates lighting distribution, socket placement, exact specifications, and picks compatible products.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A ready cart at the best prices from the closest verified traders in your area.

traders.title: Join Malaaz as a Trader
traders.bigDesc: Reach millions of homeowners across Egypt without spending on marketing.
traders.smallDesc: Free POS and inventory management system for your shop, plus visibility on Malaaz in front of customers.

lab.title: The Lab
lab.subtitle: We do not sell a product we have not tested. Every week we run live tests on products — streamed publicly.

about.title: Building the future of finishing in Egypt
about.story: Malaaz started from real frustration — we watched homeowners lose thousands because of dishonest contractors, counterfeit products, and chaotic pricing. We decided to solve it at the root: with technology, transparency, and verified traders.
about.vision: Every Egyptian able to finish their home with confidence, quality, and fair pricing.
about.mission: Digitize Egypt's finishing market by connecting homeowners with verified traders and AI that guides them every step of the way.

faq.title: Have a question?
faq.q1: When will the app be available?
faq.a1: We are in active development and targeting the first beta launch in 2025. Register now to be among the first users.
faq.a2: Yes. Homeowners use the AI assistant and marketplace completely free.
faq.q3: How do I know the products are genuine?
faq.a3: Every product on Malaaz passes documented quality tests. We run burn, mechanical, and electrical tests weekly and livestream them.
faq.a4: Absolutely. A local trader gets a full POS and inventory system for just 500 EGP per month, with free visibility on the platform.
faq.a5: We start with Greater Cairo then expand to all governorates. Our goal is full Egypt coverage within the first year.
faq.a6: Yes. Malaaz is designed from the ground up for the Egyptian market — Arabic-first interface and AI that understands local context.
faq.q7: How does the trader system work without internet?
faq.a7: The POS works offline for up to 72 hours. Data syncs automatically to the cloud when the connection returns.
faq.q8: What makes Malaaz different from a regular shopping site?
faq.a8: Malaaz is not a store. It is a smart engineer that calculates your exact needs then connects you with the best product and closest trader. A regular store only sells — Malaaz guides, saves, and guarantees.

earlyAccess.title: Be Among the First
earlyAccess.subtitle: Register now for exclusive early access and special founder offers.
earlyAccess.successMsg: Thank you! We will be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Building the future of finishing in Egypt.
